title: potentilla borussica
intro: Potentilla borussica, also known as Prickly Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and reducing fever. The plant's leaves and roots contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as reducing pain and improving wound healing. Potentilla borussica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
